_comment: Recommended MCP server configurations for Warp. Add these via Settings > MCP Servers.

Context7._description: Fetch up-to-date library/framework documentation. Essential for SDK/API work.

GitHub._description: GitHub integration for PRs, issues, and repo management.

Notion._description: Access Notion pages and databases for project documentation.

Puppeteer._description: Browser automation for web scraping and testing.
